caption: A man with short dark hair and a beard, wearing a light blue button-down shirt, stands and speaks into a handheld black microphone. He uses his left hand to gesture as he speaks. He is positioned in front of a yellow and white backdrop featuring a logo with a hand symbol and text in a non-Latin script, including the words "ஒரு" and "நேய". To his right, a man in a white shirt and yellow-striped shawl is visible in the background, while in later frames, a man in a dark suit and red tie also appears behind him. The setting is an indoor event with a white ceiling featuring recessed lighting and rectangular panels. As the sequence progresses, the man continues speaking and gesturing, with the camera angle shifting slightly and more people becoming visible in the background behind the backdrop.
